_comment: Expected shape for the textbook-screenshot fixture. The smoke test asserts outcome=='single_question_extracted' and does a relaxed string-similarity match (>= 0.7 token overlap) on extracted_question. Update extracted_question_contains and extracted_question_should_resemble when you swap in your real fixture.
extracted_question_should_resemble: Differentiate y = sin(2x) with respect to x.
